route: North Atlantic — Bay of Biscay approach
description: UK Maritime Trade Operations (UKMTO) issued advisory for severe weather conditions in Bay of Biscay. Beaufort 9–10 forecast, wave height 5–6m. Several vessels diverted to Bilbao anchorage.
EU–UK post-Brexit customs friction causing intermittent inspection delays at Dover Strait entry points. Average additional dwell time 4–6 hours for EU-flagged cargo.

Ongoing Houthi attacks on commercial shipping in Red Sea and Gulf of Aden. Joint Maritime Information Centre (JMIC) maintaining MARSEC advisory. No direct overlap with Bay of Biscay – North Sea route.
EU Council extended existing sanctions package on Russian-flag vessels. Continued prohibition on Russian-origin goods transiting EU ports.
